detail: Happy Leaf is ONE order: system project #138 (invoice #1052), value $1,537.16. The owner wrote it as budget order #141 — these are the SAME order. Reconcile the budget #141 row to project #138; do NOT create a separate #141 order. Budget order numbers are the owner's own manual sequence and are unreliable as identity.
Sauce Me A Fry has 2 completed orders (the owner's correction). The budget rows for Sauce Me A Fry may collapse some of this — confirm both orders are represented when reconciling to projects.
